name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: BREAKING: Jeff Sessions may have perjured himself
body:
Add your name to demand an independent investigation into Trump and Russia
---
**New details are trickling out every day about the Trump administration's ties to Russia. Add your name to demand an independent investigation immediately:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170301_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170301_dnc3_nd")**
"I did not have communications with the Russians."

That's what Jeff Sessions said during his confirmation hearing when questioned about whether the Trump campaign colluded with the Kremlin.

We now know that, while serving as a top Trump campaign advisor, Sessions spoke to the Russian ambassador to the U.S. twice.

Jeff Sessions may have committed perjury, which means that he cannot be allowed to oversee an investigation into this administration's ties with Russia -- because he must now be investigated.

**It's never been more important for there to be an independent investigation into connections between the Trump administration and Vladimir Putin. Add your name to demand one right now -- our democracy depends on it:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170301_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170301_dnc3_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c40a/4067b0a/2d3a8f4c5/7e7cb1f5/1758110196/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170301_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170301_dnc3_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c40a/4067b0a/2d3a8f4c5/7e7cb1f2/1758110196/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170301_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170301_dnc3_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c40a/4067b0a/2d3a8f4c5/7e7cb1f3/1758110196/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170301_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170301_dnc3_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c40a/4067b0a/2d3a8f4c5/7e7cb1f0/1758110196/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170301_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170301_dnc3_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Congratulations, Dr. Ben Carson!
body:
Celebrate by helping make your nation's faith-filled future a
reality!

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

The former National Chairman of
My Faith Votes has now been confirmed as our nation's Secretary
of Housing and Urban Development.

Congratulations, Dr. Carson!

Dr. Carson believes that "one's
faith is integrated into everything that one does so it clearly
will have an impact on everything they do." That's why he
tirelessly worked to help pioneer My Faith Votes.

My Faith Votes champions biblical
values at the intersection of faith and politics by seeking to
inspire and motivate Christ-followers to vote and get involved.

Through your support of Dr.
Carson, as well as the grassroots efforts of My Faith Votes, you
were able to help impact the faith-filled trajectory of our
nation. Sources tell us Evangelical Christians and observant
Catholics comprised 33% of the electorate on November 8th. This
was the highest share of the presidential election in the modern
era!

Dr. Carson was deeply privileged
to serve as the National Chairman of My Faith Votes, and
shares…

"What I love about My Faith Votes
is it helps people to recognize that being a person of faith does
not delete the responsibility to take part in the society in
which you're living."

While we wish Dr. and Mrs. Carson
God's richest blessings on this new chapter of their lives, My
Faith Votes still has much work to do in order to carry the light
of faith into the future of our nation. Followers of Christ must
unite to see our nation's great legacy of faith restored for our
children and our children's children.

Help secure a future of faith!
Give to My Faith Votes today to build a future that…

Protects religious freedom
Protects the dignity and
sanctity of life
Promotes strong families and
marriages
Promotes compassion and
support for those in need

Join the movement. Be one of
millions of Americans committed to carrying the torch of faith
forward.

Take your place in history and
help continue what Dr. Carson started, reaching Christ-followers
with the message that we can change our entire nation if we are
simply encouraged to pray, think and vote.

Thank you so much for your
faithful generosity. The My Faith Votes team is deeply humbled to
partner with you in ministry!

Sincerely,

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWSbl0zlNN

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: TODAY AT NOON: Rally at the Justice Department to demand Jeff Sessions resign
body:
Join us today at noon to call for Jeff Sessions' resignation
---
Friend --

Jeff Sessions met with the Russian ambassador twice during the 2016 campaign. Then, he told the Senate -- under oath -- that he didn't.

Jeff Sessions cannot oversee the investigation into the Trump administration's ties to Russia. But recusing himself from the investigation is no longer enough -- Sessions must resign as Attorney General.

There will be a legal, nonviolent demonstration outside the Department of Justice at 12:00 p.m. today to demand that Jeff Sessions resign and that his successor appoint a special prosecutor to oversee the investigation.

**Click here to get all the details -- then invite your friends and bring your handmade signs:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c407/4067b0a/2d356c7a8/7e7cb669/1065177510/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/sessions-rally?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc3_dc&source=em_20170302_dnc3_dc")**
This is incredibly important. Thanks for taking action.

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c407/4067b0a/2d356c7a8/7e7cb676/1065177510/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc3_dc&source=em_20170302_dnc3_dc"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c407/4067b0a/2d356c7a8/7e7cb677/1065177510/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc3_dc&source=em_20170302_dnc3_dc"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c407/4067b0a/2d356c7a8/7e7cb674/1065177510/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc3_dc&source=em_20170302_dnc3_dc") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c407/4067b0a/2d356c7a8/7e7cb675/1065177510/VEsD/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc3_dc&source=em_20170302_dnc3_dc"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Tom Perez
subject: 2 things that need to happen so we can get the truth:
body:
Enough is enough.
---
**Jeff Sessions must resign as Attorney General. Add your name if you agree:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resign-Jeff-Sessions1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170302_tp_v1s2&source=em_20170302_tp_v1s2")**
Friend --

No spin from the Trump administration can hide what we now know: Jeff Sessions lied under oath about meetings that he held with the Russian ambassador while working as a top-level advisor for Donald Trump's campaign.

This new information adds to a jarring trend of senior Trump administration officials lying about their communication with Russian officials. The American people are demanding answers about Trump's ties to Russia -- but before we can get those answers, a couple of things need to happen:

1. Attorney General Sessions must resign immediately. He committed perjury during his confirmation hearing and had weeks to recuse himself from this investigation. Sessions is unfit to oversee both this investigation and the Department of Justice.
2. A special prosecutor must be appointed to oversee the ongoing investigation into the members of Trump's team who were in contact with Russia -- and the cover up that includes Mike Pence, Reince Priebus, Sessions, and Trump himself.

Donald Trump's connections with Russia have undermined our democracy and put the American people in danger. We need the truth now -- but with Jeff Sessions as Attorney General, we may never get it.

**Enough is enough -- Jeff Sessions must go:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resign-Jeff-Sessions1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170302_tp_v1s2&source=em_20170302_tp_v1s2")**
Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c403/4067b0a/2d344591c/7e7cbf5e/3604845219/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170302_tp_v1s2&source=em_20170302_tp_v1s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c403/4067b0a/2d344591c/7e7cbf5f/3604845219/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_tp_v1s2&source=em_20170302_tp_v1s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c403/4067b0a/2d344591c/7e7cbf5c/3604845219/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_tp_v1s2&source=em_20170302_tp_v1s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c403/4067b0a/2d344591c/7e7cbf5d/3604845219/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_tp_v1s2&source=em_20170302_tp_v1s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Quick Signature Needed: Trump poised to gut another critical climate protection
body:
Sign the petition: Stand against Donald Trump’s anti-environment agenda » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3759&s_src=Dems&s_subsrc=trumpclimateaction)

Petition to Donald Trump:
The overwhelming majority of Americans want safe drinking water and action on climate change to protect our health, our economy, and our environment. I urge you to see reason and STOP attacking our bedrock environmental protections.

ADD YOUR NAME (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3759&s_src=Dems&s_subsrc=trumpclimateaction) Activist — A few days ago, Donald Trump signed a new executive order to gut critical drinking water protections President Obama and the EPA put in place to protect our health, our economy, and our environment.

Now we’re getting word that the Clean Power Plan, our nation’s biggest step in the fight against climate change, is next on his chopping block and it could be rolled back at any moment.

Only a month in, Trump has already signed executive orders advancing the dangerous Keystone XL and Dakota Access Pipelines, put fossil fuel industry insider Scott Pruitt in charge of the EPA, and threatened to remove the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement. Enough is enough!

We may not be able to convince Trump’s hardcore base — or his polluter pals in Congress — to value climate action, but we know how thin-skinned Donald Trump truly is, and we know he pays attention to what people say about him. Right now, Trump’s approval numbers are awful. This is our moment to show him that the people are angry and demand action!

STAND TOGETHER: Don't let Trump and Big Polluter insiders to get away with their awful plans for the environment » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3759&s_src=Dems&s_subsrc=trumpclimateaction)

There’s no sugar coating it: Trump and his administration are a menace to everything we’ve worked for. And with Scott Pruitt now officially confirmed as the head of the EPA, the forces working against us are even greater.

But we will not give up. When the EPA first proposed the Clean Power Plan, LCV supporters sent in 420,000 comments to the EPA supporting the plan. And we joined over 800,000 people in calling for drinking water protections under the Clean Water Rule. We need that same energy again right now!

People who care about breathing clean air and drinking clean water, who are worried about the dangers of climate change, and who want to save our planet are rallying together and fighting back harder than ever!

LCV is putting all our resources to build a network of engaged citizens that will prepare for the long fight ahead and push back against Trump’s radical agenda.

Clean air and clean water are fundamental rights! Don’t let Trump get away with his attacks on our environment » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3759&s_src=Dems&s_subsrc=trumpclimateaction)

Let's build a people-powered movement to protect our environment from Trump’s disastrous plans! Thank you for standing up to Donald Trump’s dangerous, anti-environment agenda.

Sincerely,

Kristin Brown
Director of Digital Strategy
League of Conservation Voters
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTM3LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvODY1MDQ0MTQ=

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276
clean_body: Sign the petition: Stand against Donald Trump’s anti-environment agenda » () Petition to Donald Trump: The overwhelming majority of Americans want safe drinking water and action on climate change to protect our health, our economy, and our environment. I urge you to see reason and STOP attacking our bedrock environmental protections. ADD YOUR NAME () Activist — A few days ago, Donald Trump signed a new executive order to gut critical drinking water protections President Obama and the EPA put in place to protect our health, our economy, and our environment. Now we’re getting word that the Clean Power Plan, our nation’s biggest step in the fight against climate change, is next on his chopping block and it could be rolled back at any moment. Only a month in, Trump has already signed executive orders advancing the dangerous Keystone XL and Dakota Access Pipelines, put fossil fuel industry insider Scott Pruitt in charge of the EPA, and threatened to remove the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement. Enough is enough! We may not be able to convince Trump’s hardcore base — or his polluter pals in Congress — to value climate action, but we know how thin-skinned Donald Trump truly is, and we know he pays attention to what people say about him. Right now, Trump’s approval numbers are awful. This is our moment to show him that the people are angry and demand action! STAND TOGETHER: Don't let Trump and Big Polluter insiders to get away with their awful plans for the environment » () There’s no sugar coating it: Trump and his administration are a menace to everything we’ve worked for. And with Scott Pruitt now officially confirmed as the head of the EPA, the forces working against us are even greater. But we will not give up. When the EPA first proposed the Clean Power Plan, LCV supporters sent in 420,000 comments to the EPA supporting the plan. And we joined over 800,000 people in calling for drinking water protections under the Clean Water Rule. We need that same energy again right now! People who care about breathing clean air and drinking clean water, who are worried about the dangers of climate change, and who want to save our planet are rallying together and fighting back harder than ever! LCV is putting all our resources to build a network of engaged citizens that will prepare for the long fight ahead and push back against Trump’s radical agenda. Clean air and clean water are fundamental rights! Don’t let Trump get away with his attacks on our environment » () Let's build a people-powered movement to protect our environment from Trump’s disastrous plans! Thank you for standing up to Donald Trump’s dangerous, anti-environment agenda. Sincerely, Kristin Brown Director of Digital Strategy League of Conservation Voters If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link: = Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c41b/4067b0a/2d2cac987/7e7ca355/1596180172/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170302_dnc4_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c41b/4067b0a/2d2cac987/7e7ca353/1596180172/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170302_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170302_dnc4_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning.

Void where prohibited. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Entries must be received between February 23 and March 2, 2017. You may enter by **[contributing here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c3/2b07114c/5a9b7c6b/736a4ad2/2352843890/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017")**. Alternatively, you can enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c3/2b07114c/5a9b7c6b/736a4acd/2352843890/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/meet-elizabeth-warren-032017"). One winner will be selected to attend lunch with Elizabeth Warren and will receive the following prize package: a round-trip ticket within the continental U.S. to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for one, and lunch with Senator Elizabeth Warren (approximate retail value of prize package $1,000). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c3/2b07114c/5a9b7c6b/736a4acc/2352843890/VEsHAw/ "http://www.dscc.org/lunch-with-elizabeth-warren-rules"). Sponsor: DSCC, 120 Maryland Ave NE, Washington, DC 20002.

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c3/2b07114c/5a9b7c6b/736a4acf/2352843890/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c3/2b07114c/5a9b7c6b/736a4ace/2352843890/VEsHDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c3/2b07114c/5a9b7c6b/736a4ac9/2352843890/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?M=C5=A9thoni_Wambu_Kraal=2C_EMILY=27s_List?=
subject: RE: Nominate a fighter from Virginia
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c6d/24c69fd9/f56dd628/18e09f09/3371793299/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all&source=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all")
---

Peter,

There is only a day left to nominate an outstanding elected woman leader (or women leaders! -- you can nominate more than one) from your community for the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.

We're so excited to celebrate another group of outstanding women doing great things for their communities in state and local office.

Know any rising stars that deserve national recognition?

**Submit your suggestion before nominations close tomorrow at midnight:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Nominate-Rising-Star](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c6d/24c69fd9/f56dd628/18e09f0a/3371793299/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170222_email_RisingStarNoms?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgNominateRisingSt&utm_campaign=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all&source=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all")**

Thanks,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Senior Director of State Engagement and Development, EMILY's List

_\-----------Original Message----------
From: Mũthoni Wambu Kraal, EMILY's List
Sent: Wed, Feb 22, 2017 at 7:55 p.m._

Peter,

Women elected to school boards, city councils, mayors' offices, countywide offices, and state legislatures are on the front lines fighting for women and families.

With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of many state legislatures, this work could not be more important.

Every year EMILY's List recognizes a woman currently serving in state or local office with the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award. We want to award a leader who is doing incredible work in her community and who has a promising career in public service ahead of her.

**[So we want to hear from you about the women leaders in your community. Nominate a woman who is fighting for women and families in your community for the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c6d/24c69fd9/f56dd628/18e09f0b/3371793299/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170222_email_RisingStarNoms?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+So+we+want+to+hear+from+you+about+the+wo&utm_campaign=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all&source=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all")**

The recipient of this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award will not only be honored at our annual EMILY's List event this spring, but will also know that we appreciate her work and hope to support her in whatever she does next in her career.

Past recipients have included Georgia House Minority Leader Stacey Abrams, Boston City Councillor Ayanna Pressley, and Speaker of the Colorado House Crisanta Duran. These women are incredible fighters in their communities -- and their work just got a lot harder with a White House hostile to the things we care about.

We want to find the next Rising Star. We know there's no shortage of local elected women fighting the good fight. But we need your help finding them so we can lift them up.

**Nominate a pro-choice Democratic woman serving in public office for this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Nominate-Rising-Star](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c6d/24c69fd9/f56dd628/18e09f04/3371793299/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170222_email_RisingStarNoms?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgNominateRisingSt&utm_campaign=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all&source=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all") **

Thank you for uplifting women leaders,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Senior Director of State Engagement and Development, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c6d/24c69fd9/f56dd628/18e09f05/3371793299/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all&source=WQENE302N_digital_email_20170302_RisingStarNoms2_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, There is only a day left to nominate an outstanding elected woman leader (or women leaders! -- you can nominate more than one) from your community for the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award. We're so excited to celebrate another group of outstanding women doing great things for their communities in state and local office. Know any rising stars that deserve national recognition? Submit your suggestion before nominations close tomorrow at midnight: "" Thanks, Mũthoni Wambu Kraal Senior Director of State Engagement and Development, EMILY's List \-----------Original Message---------- From: Mũthoni Wambu Kraal, EMILY's List Sent: Wed, Feb 22, 2017 at 7:55 p.m. Peter, Women elected to school boards, city councils, mayors' offices, countywide offices, and state legislatures are on the front lines fighting for women and families. With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of many state legislatures, this work could not be more important. Every year EMILY's List recognizes a woman currently serving in state or local office with the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award. We want to award a leader who is doing incredible work in her community and who has a promising career in public service ahead of her. "" The recipient of this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award will not only be honored at our annual EMILY's List event this spring, but will also know that we appreciate her work and hope to support her in whatever she does next in her career. Past recipients have included Georgia House Minority Leader Stacey Abrams, Boston City Councillor Ayanna Pressley, and Speaker of the Colorado House Crisanta Duran. These women are incredible fighters in their communities -- and their work just got a lot harder with a White House hostile to the things we care about. We want to find the next Rising Star. We know there's no shortage of local elected women fighting the good fight. But we need your help finding them so we can lift them up. Nominate a pro-choice Democratic woman serving in public office for this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award: "" Thank you for uplifting women leaders, Mũthoni Wambu Kraal Senior Director of State Engagement and Development, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address
body:
Recap of Week 6. |

It’s been just 6 weeks since President Donald J. Trump took office and our country is already moving in the right direction.

This week President Trump delivered an exciting speech at the PCU Gerald R. Ford where he laid out plans to bolster military spending and strengthen our national security.

**To find out more, please follow[President Donald J. Trump](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74c3b284187ab9f37440c137b861fe95544bc3050de59fb893771089acd4d087f8f32bd1fb366ff8af76199c4afdecd50fb07661370343dc) and [The White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74c3b284187ab9f3480f2b863e88678e1053aadea7531a3b5b978bfdf1d6663a2d6b288474c123f4c524aac6302e2f8138a732cebd7e23e3) on Facebook and [watch President Trump's weekly address at 11 a.m EST TOMORROW.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74c3b284187ab9f3480f2b863e88678e1053aadea7531a3b5b978bfdf1d6663a2d6b288474c123f4c524aac6302e2f8138a732cebd7e23e3)**

Thank you for your continued support.

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74c3b284187ab9f327bc4715f03571e33f6e3b93425069712d80286bb64f0e043f0ec93d9eb04261414a4e9221a5731a64dd425af188709a) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74c3b284187ab9f37a69061bc92259c49dbafc8ab7b9fe0e487fad1248dfccecf001d4fefc9edc054161753c82406b35afc1e4eb3451e584)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4c75197b43453ec291c1b0bac2ffdb7ebb113b9cf8b40cd6509a272c1b7379fc32042318973aa1936fa4307573ef76bc9)

name: breaking-news@dscc.org
subject: re: Jeff Sessions and Russia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We're tracking allegations that Attorney General Jeff Sessions lied under oath. Here are the facts we have right now: We're tracking allegations that Attorney General Jeff Sessions lied under oath. Here are the facts we have right now:
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c8/2b07114c/5af49cd0/736bb189/2092132430/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-sessions-resign?source=PT-20170302-Breaking_DS-ProsHV")
Friend --

Today, we're tracking allegations that Attorney General Jeff Sessions lied under oath.

Here are the facts we have right now:

On January 10, during his confirmation hearings, Sessions said directly, "I did not have communications with the Russians."

Later that same day, Sessions was asked, "Have you been in contact with anyone connected to any part of the Russian government about the 2016 election, either before or after election day?"

He gave a one-word answer, "No."

A story last night, however, showed both those answers to be untrue. _The Washington Post_ reported that Sessions met with Russia's ambassador to the United States during the campaign -- twice. One of those meetings came in September, after evidence of Russian hacking had been widely reported.

That revelation shows that Sessions is no longer capable of carrying out his duties as U.S. Attorney General. **Because the Department of Justice should be above reproach, it 's clear that Jeff Sessions should resign.**

In just the past few hours, senators like Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Dianne Feinstein, Kamala Harris, and Chris Van Hollen have spoken out to make that demand -- and we all need to stand with them.

And this is a critical moment -- with these ongoing investigations, Trump certainly won't fire the attorney general who has become one of his closest political allies.

So it's on us to produce a public outcry and show that this issue won't go away.

Will you add your name to be part of this debate?

**[http://dscc.org/demand-sessions-resign](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c8/2b07114c/5af49cd0/736bb189/2092132430/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-sessions-resign?source=PT-20170302-Breaking_DS-ProsHV")**

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c8/2b07114c/5af49cd0/736bb188/2092132430/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c8/2b07114c/5af49cd0/736bb18b/2092132430/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3c8/2b07114c/5af49cd0/736bb18a/2092132430/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
